examples: The rain water drains into this big vat

meanings.definition: leave suddenly and as if in a hurry
examples: The listeners bolted when he discussed his strange ideas
When she started to tell silly stories, I ran out

meanings.definition: flow, run or fall out and become lost
examples: The milk spilled across the floor
The wine spilled onto the table
We ran out of time just as the discussion was getting interesting
The water supply for the town failed after a long drought

meanings.definition: use up all one's strength and energy and stop working
examples: At the end of the march, I pooped out
